channel.title: barefoot___wanderer
channel.description: DIY 🪚 Building my own container house ⚒️ Owner Builder Learning as I go 💪

item.title: If only I documented my entire build in video form … oh wait 😝🤦‍...
item.description:
Full post Embed


If only I documented my entire build in video form … oh wait 😝🤦‍♀️

item.title: Container home build update!!! … Window restoration complete ✅ F...
item.description:
Full post Embed


Container home build update!!! … Window restoration complete ✅ Frames and casements that have glass, off getting double glazed glass installed ✅ Steels angle frames made for half of my windows ✅ These containers are about to start looking like a house and I’m so bloody excited for it 😍

item.title: Did you know you can make Xanthorrhoea resin varnish in 3 simple...
item.description:
Full post Embed


Did you know you can make Xanthorrhoea resin varnish in 3 simple steps? 🤯 Make sure you check the local laws in your area if your in Aus and if you aren’t allowed to harvest (which is common) you can buy the Xanthorrhoea resin online 🥰 I’m applying to get a license to sell mine, fingers crossed and if I get it you’ll be the first to know! 🌱

item.title: It’s Xanthorrhoea resin varnish time for the windows I’ve been r...
item.description:
Full post Embed


It’s Xanthorrhoea resin varnish time for the windows I’ve been restoring for what feels like a life time! 😝 I couldn’t be more happy with how it turned out! It’s high quality waterproof and termite resistant home made varnish straight from my homestead! Let me know if you want a reel on how to make it 😝👇

item.title: It felt like this day would never come but here it is! I have fi...
item.description:
Full post Embed


It felt like this day would never come but here it is! I have finally finished repairing and restoring my Jarrah timber windows for my container house! 🤯😝 Look I have no regrets I’m a sucker for hard work and big time savings but I’m just going to take this moment to say … … THANK F*** thats over! 😂🤦‍♀️

item.title: How much my timber mill cost VS how much I’m saving by not buyin...
item.description:
Full post Embed


How much my timber mill cost VS how much I’m saving by not buying timber 💰🪵

item.title: Easiest and most fun $6k - $8k I’ve ever saved 😝 For reference I...
item.description:
Full post Embed


Easiest and most fun $6k - $8k I’ve ever saved 😝 For reference I’ll be using these logs in my house as posts for the areas where I am making big cut outs or removing entire walls (there’s currently acroprops in their place at the moment ) I’ll also be using them for the porch roof I’ll be building around my container house over my wrap around deck 😍

item.title: Rusty old marketplace fail —————> Brand new shed! With just ...
item.description:
Full post Embed


Rusty old marketplace fail —————> Brand new shed! With just a little bit of elbow grease added along the way 😝

item.title: This 1 tonne log was a worthy competitor for the Delica, even ra...
item.description:
Full post Embed


This 1 tonne log was a worthy competitor for the Delica, even raising one of its tyres at one stage! 😝🤦‍♀️ But the Delica held and I got up this giant Marri beast onto the timber mill and milled into slabs for counter tops and tables! The plan is to have Jarrah on the exterior of the house for decking etc and Marri on the interior of the house for posts and beams and so on! 😍🪵
